entities.name: CERTIFIED ORGANIC AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming systems that adhere to and are certified by organic standards

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The country where the farming systems were studied

entities.name: AGROECOSYSTEM HEALTH
entities.description: The combined economic, social, and ecological health of agricultural ecosystems

entities.name: HEALTH INDICATORS
entities.description: Metrics developed to measure and contrast the health of farming systems

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The four specific agricultural setups in Uganda analyzed in the study

entities.name: HEALTH PATTERNS
entities.description: Four identified categories of health: ecology-driven, economically struggling, socially-driven, and hanging in

entities.name: FARM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practices and decisions made by farmers that impact agroecosystem health

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL FARM HEALTH
entities.description: The environmental and biological health component of a farm

entities.name: ORGANIC BY DEFAULT
entities.description: Farming that is organic in practice but lacks intentional organic principles or certification

entities.name: MARKET-ORIENTED SPECIALIZATION
entities.description: The strategy of focusing production on specific high-value market crops

entities.name: FOOD SHORTAGES
entities.description: A state where food availability is insufficient for the farming household

entities.name: FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for consumption rather than sale

entities.name: ORGANIC CERTIFICATION
entities.description: The formal process of verifying that a farm meets organic standards

entities.name: CASH CROP-ORIENTED CERTIFIED ORGANIC FARMING
entities.description: Organic farming focused on producing crops for sale in certified markets

entities.name: WELLBEING AND SOCIAL HEALTH
entities.description: The social and personal health aspects of the farming community

entities.name: CERTIFICATION STANDARDS
entities.description: The criteria used to determine if a farm qualifies for organic certification

entities.name: PRODUCT ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: The characteristics of a product derived from its certification status

relationships.description: strengthens if beyond organic by default
